title: MAGPIE SYS/03 / DOS operational interface
summary: Low-resolution orange-on-charcoal operational systems: radar sweeps, routing paths, terminal fragments, and continuously changing state.

title: Cassie / MAGPIE 8-bit interface
summary: A 320x240 archive instrument with active maps, signal panels, humanized cursor motion, and event-linked typing and audio.

title: Hi-fi dashboard
summary: A more detailed continuous work session built from embedded screens, archive routing, scanning, and spatially organized information.

title: Thermal behavioral cartography
summary: A sensor engine tracking distinct moving presences, overlap complexity, residual paths, target locks, and camera-driven audio.

title: FIELD STATION operational instrument
summary: The primary broadcast identity: operational header, rolling AB'S LOGS, shared procedural variables, and accumulated orange annotation.

title: 32-bit CRT display protocol
summary: A 4:3 low-resolution display layer with rounded-glass curvature, crisp bitmap typography, and a visible rolling exposure band.

title: Signal / conformal field instrument
summary: Flowing phosphor fields and orange relation lattices that measure, average, retain, and rebuild their own geometry.

title: P03B CHAMBER STATIC interface instrument
summary: A full-frame diagnostic instrument whose pressure, displacement, residue, anomaly, contour, and log modules share chamber state.

title: Modular MAGPIE workstation / painted-interface system
summary: Physical and digital interface windows arranged as reusable modules across installations, paintings, and gallery touch systems.

title: Archive / HARIL visualization interfaces
summary: Topographies of conversational pressure, threaded networks, braided structures, archive weather, and orange resonance accumulation.
